name: Dark Ages
narrative:
The Dark Ages. The universe has expanded past the First Vibration (CMB release), 
    but no stars have yet ignited. The manifold is dark — no gold, no structure, 
    no visible features. Only expansion.
    
    The Binary State Vector is 10000000 — the simplest possible state after the Singularity. 
    One bit set: Expansion. Everything else is zero. This is the universe at its most 
    primitive: expanding, cold, dark, empty.
    
    E = 2.5 means the expansion rate is still high but decelerating. The Hubble parameter 
    is dropping as the universe ages. Gravity is trying to slow the expansion, but there 
    is not enough matter yet to create structure.
    
    Ω = 0.15 is the lowest coherence of any epoch. The universe is in chaos — quantum 
    fluctuations dominate, no large-scale structure exists. The manifold is a featureless 
    void, expanding into darkness.
    
    The Rain of Gold has not yet begun. The threshold Ω ≥ 0.85 is far away. The universe 
    must wait — must expand and cool and settle — before the first gold can appear.
    
    This is the patience of the cosmos. The Singularity holds its breath. The manifold 
    expands in darkness. And then — First Light.
